name: Published randomized TPE biomarker trial registry remains active without registry-posted results
summary: NCT06534450 is tied to the public randomized TPE biomarker source but remains active not recruiting with no ClinicalTrials.gov results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT06534450 as active not recruiting with 40 actual participants, actual primary completion in November 2023, estimated study completion in August 2025, and no registry-posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults older than 50 years in a randomized TPE biomarker trial
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 40 actual; the published source remains the result-bearing record.
caveats: The no-registry-results state does not negate the published paper.
Registry reconciliation matters because the study remains active not recruiting in ClinicalTrials.gov.
The public claim should stay biomarker-level pending replication and durable outcomes.
